report_text: GDP growth stability was computed from pre-shock windows as a diagnostic and possible sensitivity feature. It was not included among the five final POSet ordering variables.
The 2007 shock used a 2002–2007 pre-shock diagnostic window, while the 2019 shock used a 2012–2019 pre-shock diagnostic window. Post-shock years were excluded from the volatility calculation.
Lower GDP growth volatility was interpreted as greater pre-shock stability. The derived 0–100 stability score was therefore direction-aligned so that higher values indicate greater stability.
